plan.description: New module with two functions: `log_info <msg>` (always prints) and `log_verbose <msg>` (prints only when KARL_VERBOSE=true). Both prepend an optional timestamp+ticket prefix when verbose. Export KARL_VERBOSE and KARL_TICKET_ID globals.

Add --verbose flag to parse_args, setting KARL_VERBOSE=true. Export it. Add `source lib/logging.sh` after existing sources. Update usage() to document --verbose. Replace the two inline `echo` calls in main() with log_info calls.
Replace all `echo` calls that emit internal agent pipeline step progress with `log_verbose`. Keep the high-level 'selected story', 'complete', and 'all stories complete' echoes as `log_info`.
Audit each file; replace diagnostic/progress `echo` calls with `log_verbose`, keep error (`>&2`) calls unchanged.
BATS tests covering: log_info always outputs; log_verbose suppressed by default; log_verbose emits with KARL_VERBOSE=true; verbose output includes timestamp and ticket id when KARL_TICKET_ID is set.
Test that `--verbose` is accepted without error, that unknown flags still error, and that KARL_VERBOSE is exported as 'true'.

testing_recommendations: Unit-test log_info and log_verbose in isolation by sourcing logging.sh in BATS setup()
Assert log_verbose produces no output when KARL_VERBOSE is unset or 'false'
Assert log_verbose produces timestamped output containing KARL_TICKET_ID when KARL_VERBOSE=true and KARL_TICKET_ID is set
Assert log_info always produces output regardless of KARL_VERBOSE value
Integration smoke: run karl.sh --dry-run and confirm only high-level lines appear; run with --verbose and confirm additional lines appear
risks: Every lib/*.sh that sources another module must not call log_verbose before logging.sh is sourced — ordering in karl.sh source block must be respected (logging.sh first or very early)
BATS tests that stub echo or capture output may need updating if they rely on exact echo-based output from loop.sh or agents.sh
shellcheck will flag uses of KARL_VERBOSE/KARL_TICKET_ID as undefined unless logging.sh exports them or files declare SC2154 suppression — must export both globals from logging.sh
